name: Potato Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and dice them as evenly as possible.
2. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
3. Add the cumin seeds, mustard seeds, turmeric, ground coriander, and cayenne to the hot oil. Stir until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
4. Add the salt and stir for another minute.
5. Add the diced potatoes and stir well to coat with the oil and spices.
6. Simmer for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potato cubes are slightly crisp on the outside.
7. Gradually add water, stirring frequently, until all ingredients are combined.
8. Lower the heat and simmer slowly for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are tender.
9. Stir in the yogurt and cooked peas, then cook for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
